bundleDescription: Generar a ZIP containing recent logs for support and troubleshooting
languageDescription: Choose the translation language. Missing entries fall back to EN, then zh-CN, then the key or ID.
openLogDir: Abrir the folder containing the application logs
skillIdDisplayDescription: Control how IDs are shown in skill tables.
title: Depuración
translationRefreshDescription: Reload runtime translation data and notify the frontend.
translationSourceModeDescription: Switch between the app's built-in translations and the editable translation files stored in AppDatos.
globalDebugInfoBody: Use this page for logs, diagnostics bundles, translation runtime tools, and developer-facing display helpers. These tools affect the app globally and are no longer nested under Meter Settings.
showHoverDescriptions: Mostrar descripciones al pasar el cursor
showHoverDescriptionsDescription: Muestra descripciones generadas en el texto emergente de habilidades, buffs, modificadores, módulos y otras filas con UID cuando estén disponibles.
bundleCreatedCopied: Diagnostics bundle created and path copied:
